race.comment: HARBOUR TOWN (2) is a lightly raced type who won well on debut at Bendigo, measuring up quite well to a BM66 at Caulfield Heath when last seen. Can improve again and rates highly in what looks a very suitable affair third time out. SABEERIA (11) has been thereabouts her past few, solid out to 2024m at Ballarat when last seen. Drawn low for Neindorf who should track the speed and take holding out. ZEACTION (9) ran below expectations last start, finishing 11th and beaten 9 lengths at this track over 1736m. The fresh run at Geelong in this grade reads well, keeping safe. COMPRESSING (4) did enough first up at Ballarat and should come on from that, respecting.
